description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist design, featuring a combination of light-colored exterior walls and large glass windows. The front facade includes a prominent garage door, a blue entry door, and a series of vertical windows that provide natural light to the interior. The rear of the bungalow opens to a private fenced backyard with a patio area shaded by a large umbrella, suggesting an outdoor living space. The side view reveals a compact layout with a visible kitchen and living area, as well as a driveway leading to the garage. The property is bordered by a low wooden fence and surrounded by a neatly maintained green lawn. The overall structure is characterized by clean lines, open spaces, and a functional, urban-friendly footprint.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large glass windows, a garage, and a fenced backyard with a patio. The design features clean lines and a minimalist aesthetic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, blue entry door, vertical windows, and large glass panels facing the street.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the kitchen, living area, and driveway, with the backyard and fence visible in the background.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced backyard, patio area with umbrella, and rear-facing windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side entrance, backyard, and the transition between the driveway and green lawn.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and rear windows
